helper.updatePasswordRequired: Leave blank to keep the current password.
helper.groupModelAccess: Leave models unselected to allow all models in this group.
helper.groupProviderAccess: Leave providers unselected to allow all providers in this group.
helper.groupUserGroupVisibility: Only selected user groups can see this billing group. Empty means nobody can see it.
helper.systemRateLimit: 0 follows the system rate; non-zero will use min(system rate, this value).
helper.unlimitedExpiresAt: Leave empty for no time limit; entered values must be in the future.
helper.userQuotaMode: Unlimited ignores wallet balance; wallet-limited charges against the wallet balance.
helper.userModelAccess: Leave models unselected to allow all models for this user.
helper.userProviderAccess: Leave providers unselected to allow all providers for this user.
helper.userRateLimit: Empty or 0 means no user-level limit; the final API rate is the minimum of the user and token limits.

validation.userRequired: User tokens must select a user.

messages.roleReadOnlyApisHint: These APIs are controlled directly by system whitelist or authenticated rules. They are not part of role authorization and cannot be selected here.
messages.apiTokenCreated: Copy and save the key. It can also be copied later from the list.
messages.providerCooldownDuplicateStatusCode: Cooldown rule status codes cannot be duplicated
messages.providerCooldownPositiveValuesRequired: Failure count and cooldown duration must be integers greater than 0
messages.providerCooldownRuleRequired: Added cooldown rules must be fully filled
messages.providerCooldownStatusCodeInvalid: Status code must be an integer from 100 to 599
messages.providerCooldownWindowRequired: Window duration must be an integer greater than 0
messages.providerCacheAffinityTtlInvalid: Cache affinity duration must be an integer greater than 0

models.groupInactive: This billing group is inactive and does not participate in actual billing.
models.groupModelAllowed: This model is available to the billing group. Prices below are the actual billed prices after applying the billing-group multiplier to the model base price.
models.groupModelDenied: This billing group does not allow the model, so it has no actual price for this model.

pricingErrors.empty: At least one pricing tier is required
pricingErrors.last-open: The last pricing tier must be unlimited
pricingErrors.number: Prices must be numbers greater than or equal to 0
pricingErrors.order: Tier limits must be ordered from low to high

titles: The Future of Renewable Energy: Innovations and Challenges Ahead
Exploring the Impact of Artificial Intelligence on Modern Healthcare
Climate Change and Its Effects on Global Food Security
The Rise of Remote Work: Benefits, Challenges, and Future Trends
descriptions: The sun slowly set over the horizon, painting the sky in vibrant hues of orange and pink.
She eagerly opened the gift, her eyes sparkling with excitement.
The old oak tree stood tall and majestic, its branches swaying gently in the breeze.
The aroma of freshly brewed coffee filled the air, awakening my senses.
The children giggled with joy as they ran through the sprinklers on a hot summer day.

recharge.title: Recharge

recharge.paymentPendingTitle: Complete payment in the new tab
recharge.paymentPendingDescription: After payment is complete, use the button below to check the arrival status.
recharge.paymentStillPending: The order is still pending. Complete payment before checking again.

recharge.paymentWindowBlocked: The payment window was blocked. Allow pop-ups and try again.
recharge.paymentWindowRedirecting: Redirecting to payment page. Please wait...

helper.defaultUserGrant: Added to the gift balance after sign-up and recorded in the wallet ledger.
helper.defaultUserGroupCode: New users are assigned to this user group during registration.
helper.defaultRateLimitRpm: Requests per minute; 0 means unlimited by system default.
helper.supportTicketCaptchaEnabled: When enabled, users must complete CAPTCHA before submitting a ticket.
helper.rechargeCaptchaEnabled: When enabled, users must complete CAPTCHA before creating a recharge order.
helper.tokenLimitPerUser: Maximum number of tokens each user can create.
helper.siteLogoUpload: Uploaded images are saved to the database and used by the frontend navigation, homepage, and auth pages.
helper.clientRequestRecordLevel: Controls the detail level for client request headers, request bodies, response headers, and response bodies.
helper.clientMaxRequestBodySizeKb: Client request bodies larger than this are truncated before recording.
helper.clientMaxResponseBodySizeKb: Client response bodies larger than this are truncated before recording.
helper.clientSensitiveRequestHeaders: Comma-separated headers redacted from client request and response headers.
helper.providerRequestRecordLevel: Controls the detail level for Hook-to-Provider request headers, request bodies, response headers, and response bodies.
helper.providerMaxRequestBodySizeKb: Provider request bodies larger than this are truncated before recording.
helper.providerMaxResponseBodySizeKb: Provider response bodies larger than this are truncated before recording.
helper.providerSensitiveRequestHeaders: Comma-separated headers redacted from Provider request and response headers.
helper.registrationEmailVerificationRequiresEma: Enable email configuration and fill SMTP host, port, username, password, and sender email first.
helper.passwordResetRequiresEmailConfig: Enable email configuration and fill SMTP host, port, username, password, and sender email first.
helper.supportTicketEmailNotificationsRequiresE: Enable email configuration and fill SMTP host, port, username, password, and sender email first.

validation.siteNameLength: Site name is required and must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.siteSubtitleLength: Site subtitle must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.publicBaseUrlLength: Public base URL must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.publicBaseUrlInvalid: Public base URL must be a valid public HTTP/HTTPS URL.
validation.defaultUserGroupCodeInvalid: Default registration user group must be 1-64 letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
validation.userGroupsLoadingBeforeSave: User groups are still loading. Try saving system settings again after they finish loading.
validation.userGroupsUnavailableBeforeSave: User groups could not be loaded. Confirm the default user group status before saving.
validation.defaultUserGroupNotActive: Select an enabled default registration user group.
validation.defaultUserGrantNonNegative: Default user initial grant must be greater than or equal to 0.
validation.defaultRateLimitRpmNonNegative: Default rate limit must be greater than or equal to 0.
validation.tokenLimitPerUserPositive: Token quantity limit must be greater than 0.
validation.requestRecordBodyLimitPositive: Request record body size limits must be greater than 0.
validation.sensitiveRequestHeaderInvalid: Sensitive request headers contain an invalid name: {{header}}.
validation.rechargeArrivalRatioPositive: Recharge arrival ratio must be greater than 0.
validation.rechargeOrderExpireMinutesPositive: Order expiry time must be greater than 0.
validation.rechargeMaxUnpaidOrdersPositive: Max unpaid orders per user must be greater than 0.
validation.rechargeAmountPositive: Minimum and maximum single recharge amounts must be greater than 0.
validation.rechargeMinAmountNotGreaterThanMax: Minimum single recharge amount cannot be greater than maximum single recharge amount.
validation.smtpHostLength: SMTP server host must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.smtpUsernameLength: SMTP username must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.smtpPasswordLength: SMTP password must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.smtpFromEmailLength: Sender email must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.smtpFromNameLength: Sender name must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.smtpPortRange: SMTP port must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
validation.smtpFromEmailInvalid: Sender email must be a valid email address.
validation.emailSuffixesRequired: Email suffix list is required when suffix restriction is enabled.
validation.emailTemplateRegistrationSubjectLength: Registration email subject is required and must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.emailTemplateRegistrationHtmlRequired: Registration email HTML template is required.
validation.emailTemplatePasswordResetSubjectLength: Password reset email subject is required and must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.emailTemplatePasswordResetHtmlRequired: Password reset email HTML template is required.

recharge.description: Controls the user recharge entry, amount conversion, and enabled state for registered payment channels.
recharge.publicBaseUrlRequiredBeforeEnablingChann: Save the public base URL before enabling a payment channel.
recharge.publicBaseUrlInvalidBeforeEnablingChanne: Save a valid HTTP/HTTPS public base URL before enabling a payment channel.
recharge.readyPaymentChannelRequiredBeforeEnablin: Save and enable at least one payment channel before enabling recharge.
recharge.paymentChannelsLoadingBeforeEnablingRech: Payment channels are still loading. Try enabling recharge again after they finish loading.
recharge.paymentChannelsUnavailableBeforeEnabling: Payment channels could not be loaded. Confirm the payment channel status before enabling recharge.

requestRecord.description: Controls how client/provider payloads are recorded and retained.

client.title: Client records

provider.description: Records requests from Hook to Providers and responses returned from Providers to Hook.

levels.full: FULL - Includes client/provider request and response payloads (~50KB/record)

email.description: Configure SMTP, ticket email notifications, password reset, and system email templates.

email.emailConfigEnabledHelper: When disabled, SMTP values are saved but not used by email features.
email.supportTicketEmailNotificationsHelper: When enabled, user ticket submissions/replies notify admins, and admin replies/status updates notify users.
